title: Move and store Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander cultural material
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Move and store Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander cultural material demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Source Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander cultural material

pcs.text: Acknowledge traditional ownership of cultural material through consultation with Community and local Knowledge Holders
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Acknowledge traditional ownership of cultural material through consultation with Community and local Knowledge Holders?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Acknowledge traditional ownership of cultural material through consultation with Community and local Knowledge Holders.

pcs.text: Consult with the appropriate traditional custodians and local Communities to determine suitable keeping places for cultural materials
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Consult with the appropriate traditional custodians and local Communities to determine suitable keeping places for cultural materials?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Consult with the appropriate traditional custodians and local Communities to determine suitable keeping places for cultural materials.

pcs.text: Work with Cultural Authorities to identify appropriate persons within local Communities who hold cultural knowledge relevant to establishing any restrictions on access to materials
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Work with Cultural Authorities to identify appropriate persons within local Communities who hold cultural knowledge relevant to establishing any restrictions on access to materials?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Work with Cultural Authorities to identify appropriate persons within local Communities who hold cultural knowledge relevant to establishing any restrictions on access to materials.

pcs.text: Seek permission and advice for being on site and using cultural material according to cultural protocols and Indigenous Cultural and Intellectual Property (ICIP) and copyright
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Seek permission and advice for being on site and using cultural material according to cultural protocols and Indigenous Cultural and Intellectual Property (ICIP) and copyright?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Seek permission and advice for being on site and using cultural material according to cultural protocols and Indigenous Cultural and Intellectual Property (ICIP) and copyright.

pcs.text: Locate and identify cultural material and objects and assess material’s suitability for moving
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Locate and identify cultural material and objects and assess material’s suitability for moving?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Locate and identify cultural material and objects and assess material’s suitability for moving.

pcs.text: Complete records according to cultural protocols and legislative requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Complete records according to cultural protocols and legislative requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Complete records according to cultural protocols and legislative requirements.

pcs.text: Identify issues and follow protocols in relation to the return of cultural material to local Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander Communities
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify issues and follow protocols in relation to the return of cultural material to local Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander Communities?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify issues and follow protocols in relation to the return of cultural material to local Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander Communities.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Source Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander cultural material

elements.title: Determine movement and storage requirements

pcs.text: Implement legislative and work health and safety requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Implement legislative and work health and safety requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Implement legislative and work health and safety requirements.

pcs.text: Assess and document the scope of work required for movement and storage of cultural material
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess and document the scope of work required for movement and storage of cultural material?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess and document the scope of work required for movement and storage of cultural material.

pcs.text: Identify and confirm organisational procedures and guidelines and specific requirements for moving and storing cultural material with relevant personnel
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and confirm organisational procedures and guidelines and specific requirements for moving and storing cultural material with relevant personnel?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and confirm organisational procedures and guidelines and specific requirements for moving and storing cultural material with relevant personnel.

pcs.text: Determine future storage requirements with relevant personnel
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine future storage requirements with relevant personnel?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine future storage requirements with relevant personnel.

pcs.text: Assess the need for and arrange specialist expertise
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess the need for and arrange specialist expertise?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess the need for and arrange specialist expertise.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Determine movement and storage requirements

elements.title: Handle and transfer Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander cultural material

pcs.text: Identify, move, store, maintain and return cultural material according to local cultural requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify, move, store, maintain and return cultural material according to local cultural requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify, move, store, maintain and return cultural material according to local cultural requirements.

pcs.text: Record details of material requiring repair or attention, and take action within scope of own job role or refer to relevant personnel as required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record details of material requiring repair or attention, and take action within scope of own job role or refer to relevant personnel as required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record details of material requiring repair or attention, and take action within scope of own job role or refer to relevant personnel as required.

pcs.text: Communicate specific local cultural protocols and requirements to colleagues and/or Cultural Authorities
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Communicate specific local cultural protocols and requirements to colleagues and/or Cultural Authorities?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Communicate specific local cultural protocols and requirements to colleagues and/or Cultural Authorities.

pcs.text: Select and use appropriate handling and moving equipment according to workplace health and safety requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select and use appropriate handling and moving equipment according to workplace health and safety requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select and use appropriate handling and moving equipment according to workplace health and safety requirements.

pcs.text: Handle cultural material in a manner that protects individual items and assists efficient loading and unloading processes
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Handle cultural material in a manner that protects individual items and assists efficient loading and unloading processes?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Handle cultural material in a manner that protects individual items and assists efficient loading and unloading processes.

pcs.text: Prepare transportation documentation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare transportation documentation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare transportation documentation.

pcs.text: Transfer cultural material to approved location
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Transfer cultural material to approved location?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Transfer cultural material to approved location.

pcs.text: Use techniques for moving material that minimise environmental disturbance and degradation, where appropriate
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Use techniques for moving material that minimise environmental disturbance and degradation, where appropriate?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Use techniques for moving material that minimise environmental disturbance and degradation, where appropriate.

pcs.text: Maintain storage records according to organisational policies and procedures

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Maintain storage records according to organisational policies and procedures.
